rationale: The cited paper is used in the hypothesis-development section to support a core mechanism: information provided around a new product helps customers assess its relevance and usefulness. This is more than a passing background mention because it directly underpins the logic for the salesperson effort -> customer perception link (H4) in the model. The citing paper does not adopt the cited paper's full framework or method, but it uses its findings as meaningful prior support for a key conceptual relationship.
relation_description: The citing paper uses Moreau et al. (2001) as prior evidence that information exposure shapes evaluations of new products. It treats that insight as conceptual grounding for its argument that greater salesperson effort can improve customer product perceptions in a new-product launch context.
